name: volunteer-system-backend
description: Backend API for Volunteer Registration System

scripts.seed: node -e "require('dotenv').config({ path: '../.env' }); const admin = require('firebase-admin'); admin.initializeApp({ credential: admin.credential.cert(require('./firebase-credentials.json')) }); const db = admin.firestore(); const fNames = ['Emma','Liam','Olivia','Noah','Ava','Oliver','Sophia','Elijah','Isabella','Lucas']; const lNames = ['Smith','Johnson','Williams','Brown','Jones','Garcia','Miller','Davis','Rodriguez','Martinez']; const cities = ['Austin','Seattle','Denver','Boston','Miami']; const allSkills = [['Event Planning'],['Data Entry'],['Teaching'],['First Aid'],['Cooking']]; const vols = Array.from({length: 5}).map((_, i) => { const f = fNames[Math.floor(Math.random()*fNames.length)]; const l = lNames[Math.floor(Math.random()*lNames.length)]; return { firstName: f, lastName: l, email: f.toLowerCase() + '.' + l.toLowerCase() + Date.now().toString().slice(-4) + i + '@example.com', phone: '555-' + Math.floor(1000 + Math.random() * 8999), city: cities[Math.floor(Math.random()*cities.length)], skills: allSkills[Math.floor(Math.random()*allSkills.length)], status: 'pending', hoursLogged: 0, createdAt: admin.firestore.FieldValue.serverTimestamp() }; }); const batch = db.batch(); vols.forEach(v => batch.set(db.collection('volunteers').doc(), v)); batch.commit().then(() => { console.log('✅ Successfully added 5 pending volunteers with random names!'); process.exit(0); }).catch(console.error);"
